title: rostraria cristata subsp. obtusiflora
intro: Rostraria cristata subsp. obtusiflora, also known as Obtuse-flowered Bristle-grass or Obtuse-flowered Hair-grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestive health. Rostraria cristata subsp. obtusiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and useful plant in traditional medicine.
